— ANVIX™ Product
ANVIX™
Greenhouse Films
by Blacksoil International

ANVIX™ Greenhouse Films are engineered with advanced multi-layer technology to optimise light transmission, thermal efficiency and crop protection across a wide range of greenhouse environments.

From light diffusion and anti-drip surfaces to thermal IR retention and UV stability, ANVIX™ greenhouse film solutions are built to support healthier crops, longer growing seasons and improved structural performance.

ANVIX™ Greenhouse Films  ·  Blacksoil International

Key Properties
12 Characteristics
Light Diffusion
Crystal Clear to High Diffusion
ANVIX™ Greenhouse Films — Technology
Engineered for Performance
Every ANVIX™ greenhouse film is built on a foundation of advanced film technologies — designed to work together to protect crops, optimise light and extend service life.
‹
01
Long Lifetime
High quality UV stabilizers protect films from degradation and extend service life.
Learn More →
02
Superior Strength
Enhanced mechanical properties for high durability and resistance to tearing.
Learn More →
03
High Light Transmission
Maximizes natural light penetration for healthier crop growth.
Learn More →
04
Light Diffusion
Distributes light evenly throughout the canopy to reduce shadows and improve uniformity.
Learn More →
05
Thermal IR Technology
Reduces heat loss during night-time and maintains a stable growing environment.
Learn More →
06
Anti-Drip
Transforms droplets into a water film to improve light transmission.
Learn More →
07
Anti-Fog / Anti-Mist
Reduces condensation and maintains greenhouse clarity.
Learn More →
08
Anti-Dust
Minimizes dust accumulation and maintains optical performance.
Learn More →
09
Disease Control
Supports crop protection through specialized film technologies.
Learn More →
10
Cooling Effect
Reduces excessive heat build-up inside the greenhouse.
Learn More →
11
Photoselective Technology
Modifies the light spectrum to influence crop growth and development.
Learn More →
12
Algae-Proof Technology
Helps prevent algae formation and maintains film transparency.
Learn More →

      Why ANVIX™ Greenhouse Films
      Key Benefits
      01
      Optimised Light Management
      Light diffusion and high transmission technologies support healthier crop development.
      02
      Thermal Efficiency
      Thermal IR technology retains heat during cooler nights, improving temperature stability.
      03
      Long-Term Durability
      UV stabilisation and superior strength extend service life under demanding conditions.
      04
      Cleaner Greenhouse Environment
      Anti-drip, anti-fog, anti-dust and algae-proof properties maintain optical clarity.
      05

      Photoselective and disease control technologies tailored to specific crop requirements.
